claude-code/first-party/claude-code-setu.name: claude-code-setup
claude-code/first-party/claude-code-setu.description: Analyze codebases and recommend tailored Claude Code automations such as hooks, skills, MCP servers, and subagents.

claude-code/first-party/claude-md-manage.name: claude-md-management
claude-code/first-party/claude-md-manage.description: Tools to maintain and improve CLAUDE.md files - audit quality, capture session learnings, and keep project memory current.
claude-code/first-party/claude-md-manage.author: Anthropic

claude-code/first-party/code-review.name: code-review
claude-code/first-party/code-review.description: Automated code review for pull requests using multiple specialized agents with confidence-based scoring
claude-code/first-party/code-review.author: Anthropic

claude-code/first-party/code-simplifier.name: code-simplifier
claude-code/first-party/code-simplifier.description: Agent that simplifies and refines code for clarity, consistency, and maintainability while preserving functionality
claude-code/first-party/code-simplifier.author: Anthropic

claude-code/first-party/commit-commands.name: commit-commands
claude-code/first-party/commit-commands.description: Streamline your git workflow with simple commands for committing, pushing, and creating pull requests
claude-code/first-party/commit-commands.author: Anthropic

claude-code/first-party/example-plugin.name: example-plugin
claude-code/first-party/example-plugin.description: A comprehensive example plugin demonstrating all Claude Code extension options including commands, agents, skills, hooks, and MCP servers
claude-code/first-party/example-plugin.author: Anthropic

claude-code/first-party/explanatory-outp.name: explanatory-output-style
claude-code/first-party/explanatory-outp.description: Adds educational insights about implementation choices and codebase patterns (mimics the deprecated Explanatory output style)
claude-code/first-party/explanatory-outp.author: Anthropic

claude-code/first-party/feature-dev.name: feature-dev
claude-code/first-party/feature-dev.description: Comprehensive feature development workflow with specialized agents for codebase exploration, architecture design, and quality review
claude-code/first-party/feature-dev.author: Anthropic

claude-code/first-party/frontend-design.name: frontend-design
claude-code/first-party/frontend-design.description: Frontend design skill for UI/UX implementation
claude-code/first-party/frontend-design.author: Anthropic

claude-code/first-party/hookify.name: hookify
claude-code/first-party/hookify.description: Easily create hooks to prevent unwanted behaviors by analyzing conversation patterns
claude-code/first-party/hookify.author: Anthropic

claude-code/first-party/learning-output-.name: learning-output-style
claude-code/first-party/learning-output-.description: Interactive learning mode that requests meaningful code contributions at decision points (mimics the unshipped Learning output style)
claude-code/first-party/learning-output-.author: Anthropic

claude-code/first-party/math-olympiad.name: math-olympiad
claude-code/first-party/math-olympiad.description: Solve competition math (IMO, Putnam, USAMO) with adversarial verification that catches what self-verification misses. Fresh-context verifiers attack proofs with specific failure patterns. Calibrated abstention over bluffing.
claude-code/first-party/math-olympiad.author: Anthropic

claude-code/first-party/mcp-server-dev.name: mcp-server-dev
claude-code/first-party/mcp-server-dev.description: Skills for designing and building MCP servers that work seamlessly with Claude — guides you through deployment models (remote HTTP, MCPB, local), tool design patterns, auth, and interactive MCP apps.
claude-code/first-party/mcp-server-dev.author: Anthropic

claude-code/first-party/playground.name: playground
claude-code/first-party/playground.description: Creates interactive HTML playgrounds — self-contained single-file explorers with visual controls, live preview, and prompt output with copy button
claude-code/first-party/playground.author: Anthropic

claude-code/first-party/plugin-dev.name: plugin-dev
claude-code/first-party/plugin-dev.description: Plugin development toolkit with skills for creating agents, commands, hooks, MCP integrations, and comprehensive plugin structure guidance
claude-code/first-party/plugin-dev.author: Anthropic

claude-code/first-party/pr-review-toolki.name: pr-review-toolkit
claude-code/first-party/pr-review-toolki.description: Comprehensive PR review agents specializing in comments, tests, error handling, type design, code quality, and code simplification
claude-code/first-party/pr-review-toolki.author: Anthropic

claude-code/first-party/ralph-loop.name: ralph-loop
claude-code/first-party/ralph-loop.description: Continuous self-referential AI loops for interactive iterative development, implementing the Ralph Wiggum technique. Run Claude in a while-true loop with the same prompt until task completion.
claude-code/first-party/ralph-loop.author: Anthropic

claude-code/first-party/security-guidanc.name: security-guidance
claude-code/first-party/security-guidanc.description: Security reminder hook that warns about potential security issues when editing files, including command injection, XSS, and unsafe code patterns
claude-code/first-party/security-guidanc.author: Anthropic

claude-code/first-party/skill-creator.name: skill-creator
claude-code/first-party/skill-creator.description: Create new skills, improve existing skills, and measure skill performance. Use when users want to create a skill from scratch, update or optimize an existing skill, run evals to test a skill, or benchmark skill performance with variance analysis.
claude-code/first-party/skill-creator.author: Anthropic

claude-code/third-party/asana.name: asana
claude-code/third-party/asana.description: Asana project management integration. Create and manage tasks, search projects, update assignments, track progress, and integrate your development workflow with Asana's work management platform.
claude-code/third-party/asana.author: Asana

claude-code/third-party/context7.name: context7
claude-code/third-party/context7.description: Upstash Context7 MCP server for up-to-date documentation lookup. Pull version-specific documentation and code examples directly from source repositories into your LLM context.
claude-code/third-party/context7.author: Upstash

claude-code/third-party/discord.name: discord
claude-code/third-party/discord.description: Discord channel for Claude Code — messaging bridge with built-in access control. Manage pairing, allowlists, and policy via /discord:access.

claude-code/third-party/fakechat.name: fakechat
claude-code/third-party/fakechat.description: Localhost iMessage-style web chat for Claude Code — test surface with file upload and edits. No tokens, no access control.

claude-code/third-party/firebase.name: firebase
claude-code/third-party/firebase.description: Google Firebase MCP integration. Manage Firestore databases, authentication, cloud functions, hosting, and storage. Build and manage your Firebase backend directly from your development workflow.
claude-code/third-party/firebase.author: Google

claude-code/third-party/github.name: github
claude-code/third-party/github.description: Official GitHub MCP server for repository management. Create issues, manage pull requests, review code, search repositories, and interact with GitHub's full API directly from Claude Code.
claude-code/third-party/github.author: GitHub

claude-code/third-party/gitlab.name: gitlab
claude-code/third-party/gitlab.description: GitLab DevOps platform integration. Manage repositories, merge requests, CI/CD pipelines, issues, and wikis. Full access to GitLab's comprehensive DevOps lifecycle tools.
claude-code/third-party/gitlab.author: GitLab

claude-code/third-party/greptile.name: greptile
claude-code/third-party/greptile.description: AI code review agent for GitHub and GitLab. View and resolve Greptile's PR review comments directly from Claude Code.
claude-code/third-party/greptile.author: Greptile

claude-code/third-party/imessage.name: imessage
claude-code/third-party/imessage.description: iMessage channel for Claude Code — reads chat.db directly, sends via AppleScript. Built-in access control; manage pairing, allowlists, and policy via /imessage:access.

claude-code/third-party/laravel-boost.name: laravel-boost
claude-code/third-party/laravel-boost.description: Laravel development toolkit MCP server. Provides intelligent assistance for Laravel applications including Artisan commands, Eloquent queries, routing, migrations, and framework-specific code generation.
claude-code/third-party/laravel-boost.author: Laravel

claude-code/third-party/linear.name: linear
claude-code/third-party/linear.description: Linear issue tracking integration. Create issues, manage projects, update statuses, search across workspaces, and streamline your software development workflow with Linear's modern issue tracker.
claude-code/third-party/linear.author: Linear

claude-code/third-party/playwright.name: playwright
claude-code/third-party/playwright.description: Browser automation and end-to-end testing MCP server by Microsoft. Enables Claude to interact with web pages, take screenshots, fill forms, click elements, and perform automated browser testing workflows.
claude-code/third-party/playwright.author: Microsoft

claude-code/third-party/serena.name: serena
claude-code/third-party/serena.description: Semantic code analysis MCP server providing intelligent code understanding, refactoring suggestions, and codebase navigation through language server protocol integration.
claude-code/third-party/serena.author: Oraios

claude-code/third-party/slack.name: slack
claude-code/third-party/slack.description: Slack workspace integration. Search messages, access channels, read threads, and stay connected with your team's communications while coding. Find relevant discussions and context quickly.
claude-code/third-party/slack.author: Slack

claude-code/third-party/supabase.name: supabase
claude-code/third-party/supabase.description: Supabase MCP integration for database operations, authentication, storage, and real-time subscriptions. Manage your Supabase projects, run SQL queries, and interact with your backend directly.
claude-code/third-party/supabase.author: Supabase

claude-code/third-party/telegram.name: telegram
claude-code/third-party/telegram.description: Telegram channel for Claude Code — messaging bridge with built-in access control. Manage pairing, allowlists, and policy via /telegram:access.

claude-code/third-party/terraform.name: terraform
claude-code/third-party/terraform.description: The Terraform MCP Server provides seamless integration with Terraform ecosystem, enabling advanced automation and interaction capabilities for Infrastructure as Code (IaC) development.
claude-code/third-party/terraform.author: HashiCorp
